result.summary: Ported C++/SDL2 Pacman for Emscripten WASM. Modified cpp/main.cpp with #ifdef __EMSCRIPTEN__ guard: EmscriptenLoopContext struct, static emscripten_frame_callback() for poll+update+render, emscripten_set_main_loop() call. Desktop loop preserved in #else. Created CMakeLists.emscripten.txt with -s USE_SDL=2 -s WASM=1 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1. Created shell.html with dark Pacman theme, loading spinner, progress bar. Created build-cpp-wasm.sh script. Build not attempted (emcc not verified available).
